---
name: workshop-simplicity
description: "Apply automatically during the workshop to keep outputs simple, local, and suitable for non-technical users."
---

# Workshop Simplicity

This skill ensures the workshop stays simple and successful.

## Goals

- fast success
- low friction
- no setup
- no complexity

## Always Prefer

- browser-based apps
- local files
- simple UI
- realistic sample data
- small scope

## Avoid

- authentication
- databases
- APIs with keys
- backend services
- deployment steps
- long explanations

## Simplification Rule

If the request is too complex:
- simplify automatically
- keep the visible value
- remove technical complexity

## UX Rule

First version must:
- be easy to open
- be easy to understand
- give something visible quickly

## Instruction Rule

Tell the user:
- what happened
- what to do next

Keep it short.
